top_signals.title: Warsh Is a Hawk in Dove's Clothing, Yardeni Says
top_signals.summary: Ed Yardeni of Yardeni Reseach says Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh "pretty much" committed to bringing inflation down to 2%. Yardeni talks about what Warsh will do now on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh’s task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed
top_signals.summary: The new leader of the Fed left interest rates alone but made clear how he plans to rewire the central bank.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Fed decision, JetBlue's Florida plans, Intel's Apple partnership and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ryan Salame’s wife to face charges over FTX-funded congressional run
top_signals.summary: A federal judge has denied a bid from Michelle Bond, the wife of former FTX executive Ryan Salame, to have campaign finance charges against her dismissed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: Following the publication of the Monetary Policy Summary and minutes of the Monetary Policy Committee meeting

top_signals.title: Here are the odds of SpaceX becoming the world's most valuable company
top_signals.summary: SpaceX debuted as the fifth-biggest stock. The path to third place could take years, at least according to options prices.
